svg.text: Resource Group: group1_final • Region: Sweden Central • Single public ingress via Application Gateway (WAF v2)

g.text: agw-secureflow-dev · waf-secureflow-dev · TLS terminate, OWASP rules, rate-limit (RateLimitLayer7Flood)
Browser-based SSH/RDP, no public IP on VMs
SSH only from snet-ops; ingress from snet-appgw
runs on Ops VM, reaches private VMSS
✓ Single public ingress: only pip-secureflow-dev-appgw is exposed; AppGW WAF v2 fronts both tiers.
✓ No public IPs on VMSS; SQL public network access disabled; Key Vault behind private endpoint.
✓ Routing: / → frontend pool (port 80, nginx) · /api/* → backend pool (port 8080, /api/health probe).
✓ Monitoring: App Insights + Log Analytics + 3+ metric/Kusto alerts → Action Groups → Slack.
✓ Automation: GitHub Actions (infra/frontend/backend) on self-hosted runner; TF remote state in Storage.
✓ Security: NSGs limit AppGW→tier ingress, ops-only SSH; Bastion for admin; Managed Identity → Key Vault.
